meaning: National Hot Rod Association (美国)全国改装式高速汽车协会
examples: You'll find just about everything from NASCAR stock cars and NHRA drag racers to karts running somewhere at the speedway.
When Danny decides to enter the NHRA High School Drags, he's forced to seek his father's help in taking down the local hot shot.
He became a 15-time NHRA Funny Car champion, but Englishtown provided him with one of his first pedestals.
Owens suggests that the top echelon of the NHRA has no accountability to the 80, 000 people it calls members.
In a statement from spokesman Jerry Archambeault, the NHRA said it was granted exempt status by the IRS decades ago.
